title: Pyr - Overhauled Nether Portals
description: Portals are restricted to ruined portal structures, or anywhere with a gold block and netherite ingot.
body:
![frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4cd60599814283f407c56a62f4d0fd8a94512e2.png)[](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legendary-portals)[](https://modrinth.com/project/improved-portals)
RESOURCEPACK ONLY Click the **activated portals** for the corresponding resource pack without the data pack
___ Nether portals can now only be lit normally in an already linked part of the overworld or nether; at a ruined portal site. To summon a portal anywhere you have to mimic the portal structures of old already in the game. Build a ruined portal frame, either: - a 5x6 frame with a gold block on top in the middle, and place a glow item frame on top with a netherite ingot. - a 8x10 frame with two gold blocks in the middle, two blocks above, and place a glow item frame with a netherite ingot on top of each. ## Why? To encourage the player to engage with their world seed's unique terrain; building around the seed and not in spite of it. ___ **_The datapack doubles as a REQUIRED resource pack._**
